response.original_title: Un día en el Jardín de la Infancia Nº1
response.overview: A newsreel from the 1940s about the education children receive at this school, founded in 1930, mentions that there are 87 kindergartens throughout the country, providing medical care and technical courses for students. It also notes that mothers are taught how to prepare food for their children and other household tasks.
response.title: Un día en el Jardín de la Infancia Nº1
